summary: Iteration 17: Sandbox Management Tests - Conway sandboxes are prepaid and non-refundable. All 11 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend UI tests pass (100%). Key features verified: delete-sandbox blocked with non-refundable message, reset-sandbox returns 'no sandbox' when none exists, create-sandbox checks for existing sandboxes, list-sandboxes returns Conway API data, credits balance/purchase work, Telegram health/test messages work, Conway health returns all services healthy.
critical_code_review_comments: delete-sandbox correctly blocked with message: 'Sandbox deletion is disabled — Conway sandboxes are prepaid and non-refundable. Use Reset Agent to wipe and re-provision'
reset-sandbox correctly returns 'No sandbox to reset' when no sandbox exists
create-sandbox endpoint checks GET /v1/sandboxes for existing sandboxes before creating new ones (line 221 in agent_setup.py)
list-sandboxes returns sandbox list from Conway API
Credits balance shows $0.00 (correct for test API key)
Credits purchase generates QR code with x402 payment protocol (USDC on Base)
Conway health returns all_healthy with cloud, domains, inference services
Reset Agent button correctly hidden when no sandbox exists (hasSandbox check in App.js line 573)
Provisioning stepper shows 6/6 steps with proper gating by credits
Info box shows $5k survival threshold and 50% creator split
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 focused on sandbox management - verifying Conway's non-refundable prepaid sandbox protection. All backend endpoints tested with real API calls (no mocks). delete-sandbox is blocked, reset-sandbox checks for existing sandbox, create-sandbox reuses existing sandboxes. Frontend correctly hides Reset Agent button when no sandbox exists. Conway API key has 0 credits which is expected for testing.
backend_apis_tested: POST /api/provision/delete-sandbox - 200 OK (success=false, error mentions non-refundable, use_instead=/api/provision/reset-sandbox)
POST /api/provision/reset-sandbox - 200 OK (error='No sandbox to reset' when no sandbox exists)
POST /api/provision/create-sandbox - 200 OK (checks for existing sandboxes, returns error with 0 credits)
GET /api/provision/list-sandboxes - 200 OK (returns sandbox list from Conway API)
GET /api/provision/status - 200 OK (agent_id, sandbox status, tools, skills_loaded, credits_cents)
POST /api/credits/purchase - 200 OK (QR code, pay_to address, amount_usdc, instructions)
GET /api/conway/health - 200 OK (all_healthy=true, services: cloud, domains, inference)
GET /api/provision/sandbox-info - 200 OK (returns error='No sandbox' when no sandbox exists)

genesis_screen.payment_qr: PASS - displays QR code after clicking Add Credits
genesis_screen.pay_to_address: PASS - shows USDC address on Base network
genesis_screen.balance_polling: PASS - 'Watching for payment... balance updates every 5s'

provisioning_stepper.step_terminal: PASS - Conway Terminal + wallet + API key
provisioning_stepper.step_skills: PASS - Push skill definitions into sandbox

frontend_features_verified.reset_agent_button: PASS - correctly hidden when no sandbox exists

dashboard.agent_selector: PASS - Anima Fund with green status dot
